title: Decadent Pungent Australian Mushroom Dumplings
description: Velvety, midnight-craving dumplings packed with pungent mushrooms, perfect for a vegan nightcap.
instructions: In a mixing bowl combine flour with 1/4 tsp sea salt; set aside.
In a skillet, heat sesame oil over medium heat; add minced garlic and grated ginger, sauté until fragrant.
Add sliced mushrooms to skillet; cook until soft, about 5 minutes; stir in soy sauce, chili paste, lime juice, and scallions; remove from heat.
Let the mushroom mixture cool slightly, then stir it into the flour mixture, adding water 1 tbsp at a time until a pliable dough forms.
Divide dough into 8 equal portions; roll each into a small disk, place a spoonful of mushroom filling in center, and fold into half-moon dumplings, sealing edges with a fork.
Prepare a steamer basket lined with parchment; arrange dumplings without touching.
Steam dumplings over high heat for 7 minutes, or until dough is translucent and slightly velvety.
Serve hot with a squeeze of lime and extra chili paste on the side.
